subcodes.first_line: O thou exalted bough of the divine Lote-Tree! ...When thou art disdained and rejected by the wicked doers be not cast down
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع رفیع سدره مبارکه جناب آقا سید میرزا چون در اینجا تشریف داشتند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
